use_cases: Showcasing product features for SaaS applications
Displaying team capabilities and support offerings
Highlighting service benefits with icons and descriptions
Creating feature comparison sections on landing pages
Presenting scalable team solutions to potential customers
ai_summary: A minimalist features section component featuring a two-column grid layout with a heading, descriptive text, and an icon-enhanced feature list on the left, alongside a decorative payments illustration on the right. Designed for SaaS and scaling team contexts, it uses Tailwind CSS with gradient accents and responsive breakpoints for desktop and mobile platforms.
